body_html:
yes
--- Cecilia Steen cecilia.steen@gmail.com wrote:

Laura would like to purchase this DVD course:
Getting to Know Office &
Windows XP by CompUSA Training, $50
...and this acct class at Hunter College. Pls
advise:

Accounting Basics for Non-Accountants
*Also available in Business, Entrepreneurship &
Professional

Developmenthttp://ce.hunter.cuny.edu/courses/viewcourses_category.cfm?id=3

Tuition:* $250.00*
Financial Aid Available: No
Course Description

This is basic financial accounting course intended
to provide beginners with
a foundation in the concepts of financial
accounting. Topics include setting
up general ledger systems, essential financial
processing systems, concepts
of accounts receivable and accounts payable systems,
and general ledger
accounting.

Note: This course uses QuickBooks to assist with
teaching lessons,
students must have basic computer knowledge.

Course Text: Required textbook not included in
course fees: Keeping The

Bookshttp://www.amazon.com/gp/product/0793179297/sr=1-1/qid=1145566792/ref=pd_bbs_1/104-0254235-8030364?%5Fencoding=UTF8&s=books

by
Linda Pinson.

Related Courses: Introduction to

QuickBookshttp://ce.hunter.cuny.edu/courses/coursedetails.cfm?course_webid=1452,

Bookkeeping &

Budgetinghttp://ce.hunter.cuny.edu/courses/coursedetails.cfm?course_webid=1449
